meta.scope: Top 30 airports by traffic in the selected sample
meta.scope_note: Values come from project tables and prepared analysis data files.

feature_meta.feature_time_policy: Historical aggregate features are fitted on train split; rolling features use shifted prior flights only.

modelSummary.calibration_note: isotonic calibration fitted on validation split
modelSummary.shap_note: Tree SHAP computed on a representative test sample
